" MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FARMERS WELFARE (Department of Agriculture, Co-operation and Farmers Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12'h June. 2018 G.S.R. 567(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section I24 of the Multi-State Co-operative Societies Act, 2002 (39 of 2002), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Multi-State Co—operative Societies Rules, 2002, namely :- 1. (I) These rules may be called the Multi-State Cooperative Societies (Amendment) Rules. 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette 2. In the Multi-Stale Ctr-operative Societies Rules, 2002, in rule 25, in subvrule (3). after the words “a separate account", the words “to‘be operated jointly by the Chief Executive of the National Co-operative Union of India Limited, New Delhi and an officer of the Central Government not below the rank of Director responsible for finance in the Department ot‘Agrieulture, Co-operation and Farmers Welfare authorized by the Central Government." shall be inserted. [F. No. L~11012l2l2003~L&M] DINESH KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note 2 The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part ll, Section 3, Sub-section (i). vide number G.S‘Ri 790(E), dated the 2"d December, 2002 and subsequently amended by G.S.R. 717(5), dated the 12‘'1 November. 2007, G.S.R. 447(E), dated the 15‘“ June, 2012 and 05,11. 798(E), dated the 17‘“ August, 2016‘ for Mi Agriculture & Farmers Welfare a :1 Ministry L ' Uglirt‘amti its} m r, Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press.
